exam_format: Linear (online proctored via OnVUE or in-person Pearson VUE)

testing_centers.notes: ZDTA/ZDTE/ZDXA: In-person at Pearson VUE test centers or online-proctored via OnVUE. OnVUE not available in China. ZTCA is an unproctored online self-assessment only.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Name must match Zscaler Cyber Academy account exactly.
exam_rules: ZDTA/ZDTE/ZDXA: Online proctored (OnVUE) or in-person at Pearson VUE. Closed-book. No personal items, notes, or reference materials permitted. Online: must be alone in room, one display only, no VMs or remote desktop. Free study guide and exam blueprint available per certification on Cyber Academy. ZTCA is an unproctored self-assessment (online exam, not proctored).
renewal_options: Proctored certifications (ZDTA/ZDTE/ZDXA) are valid for 2 years from date earned. Recertification requires retaking the current version of the exam before expiry.

retake_policy.notes: 30-day waiting period between failed attempts. Full exam fee required for each retake. Exam fees are non-refundable and non-transferable.

official_study_resources.title: Zscaler Cyber Academy
official_study_resources.notes: Free study guides and eLearning courses available after creating a Cyber Academy account

aliases: zscaler zero trust certified architect ztca
ztca zscaler zero trust cyber associate
